content: This is what it looks likr rn. Id appreciated some help on what do for the longevity of the account. im on chapter 2 for story.

- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific

## Compendium

- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

u have a great day bro
but my hp is slowly decreasing, i remember it was 800-ish hp when i first entered the stage
i still wanna play poison though, then who can i replace wanda with?
i think it was a good option for playing poison x counter since they both ummm idk the word not kill by true dmg?
some mobs and the boss give you a sympton card (iirc it's called disollution) that, if you don't play it, at end of turn reduces your max hp by a %. You should always play it prior to the boss.

depends on what you have on your roster, but I don't engage with poison that much anyway, so I'd suggest bringing this to <#1400749543288475770>. Focusing on multiple afflictions is not great because you want things that maximize how much you benefit from stacking the given affliction (Wanda's additional but weaker enemy attacks, Xu's spellbound, Nautila dealing damage based on counter, poison triggers, etc). Wanda does not contribute to the poison gameplan beyond expensive str down. Some more synergistic alternatives would be something like Lily, or a reliable source of weakness like horla, or Liz with strength stacking like Clementine.
ahh i see, is clementine great with this team?
should i get clementine or just put liz?
wait lemme show you my characters

Clementine is a keyflare and str generator, and she gives an extra damage multiplier through her exalt. I mentioned her because Liz applies poison equal to damage, which means that more str = more poison. Fixed poison applicators (like GDoll) does not care about str at all, so only bring clementine if you're also bringing liz.
Again, I'm not very experienced with poison teams, if you want to ensure it will work with low investment, I suggest you ask in <#1400749543288475770>

got it thank you again!! for your recommendation of casiah, if i put her in i won’t be able to use saya together due to realm conflict, so for corpo tulu casiah, who would you recommend 4th slot to be? since i don’t have gmurphy either. thank you for the extra guide on that as well.

so try to get my teams to lvl 50-60, besides the team that will have the big support. and then get all skills to lvl 3, soulforge to lvl 1, higher if dps carry. this would be the general investment process?

i don’t currently have much of the advanced skill materials to upgrade things like exalt to lvl 3, would mimetic crystals be good to use to synthesize them? or is there better ways to use those crystals. i hadn’t converted any yet bc i wasn’t sure if that was a good idea.

Celeste or Faint, since they are good generic supports. I guess you can try Aurita like you originally suggested, but it will feel clunkier.

That's a good baseline, yeah. At some point you'll want to level 60 minimum, but don't sweat it.  I would suggest lvl 60 your story team first though. Do also check what each awakener's soulforge do beyond extra stats, some might be worth investing beyond just level 1 (ask in <#1433513650299076780> if unsure).

Mimetic crystals are there solely to convert them into advanced skill materials. Do keep in mind that your main source of mimetic and advanced materials is under a weekly timegate.

Thanks for the reply Nini, i've been following your advice and came up with some teams. but im still wondering on some spots that i need to fill since some teams need the same charaters at the same time.

i dont have much question about the mouchette n vortice team. but i do wonder if aigis, helot, or pickman could be replaced, since other teams might need them more

for the saya + sanga team, i was a bit confused. i search some team example for saya n sanga, n found that saya/sanga/salv/murphy are pretty common suggestion, but murphy alr been used in vortice team.

ghelot team, idk what to fill the empty spots with. was thinking castor and doresain there.

for the last team which is the support team, was thinking of kath whale friend support with ultra supps

for starters, if this is for alert 3 or lower, anything will work as a replacement or as filler. I once filled a Caecus counter team with Lotan for a3 and it was a breeze anyway lmao. Again, Cheri's guide has a section on dtides that explains the difficulties and the rewards the mode gives, check it out.

Now, for higher alerts, I would factor in the great supports first. Use your Faint and Castor somewhere. I would prob slot Faint with Mouch since Mouch loves DR (check her e1 and soulforge talent). You can bring a whale awakener that is a dupe of one you are already using, so you can instead bring a whale Mouch and use those ultra supports somewhere else, since whaled Mouch doesn't need nearly as much support as Kath. Use your doresain as a vuln source (prob on the whale mouch team).

Don't be rigid with team making, you'll often need to make budget replacements, leave wheels out or give replacements that do not translate 1:1 (what the guide describes as starving). Murphy is an excellent tanking unit as well as a vuln and weak source with arith generation on the side. Salvador already gives vuln/weak, so you can bring another unit that helps with armor, survivability and/or accelerating the gameplan. My Saya/Sanga team runs Faros and Thais and it works just fine, for example. Try replacing Murphy with Faros or Caecus instead. Run the memory spiral wheel too (Nautila's wheel) to help with armor between turns.

I don't run Gelot, so I don't think I should advise you with that team. Open another thread or ask in <#1400749543288475770> instead. If you are unsure whether a team has too much support, the better thing to do is just run it in dtide and get a feel for it. You can reset clears as many times as you please after all.
Hi, so I've done some more pulls lol
What is a team that i could do with Saya and Clementine as a DPS ?
And on which team the +12 Blade of the Titan would be the best ?

for dtide? I wouldn't recommend it since clem is too valuable of a support to take away for a job others can achieve. Check this https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1514650465458065459

I do admit though that Clem/Saya is very epic. Clem wants to exalt big time, so consider bringing an aliemus source, vuln sources or big damage buffs. Spooky (well known 425 dtide player) runs the pair with Arachne and either Horla or Winkle: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TWVXkIKK03s

embeds.title: Clementine Dps 1 Turn A5W5 | Saya showcase

content: blade runs best on a dps that lacks the crit or play a lot of cards after exalting. Think Kath, Gmurphy, Gelot, Caecus carry.

I tried to do 5 teams with what i have, tell me if you have any suggestion in order to make better teams for dtide : mt1.AAUXEzwGOQAwPAFQABg8f1gAAzwDVQA1CjwqWwA5PIWEADg8XIMANTwihgAEIzw-XwAgPDpRADI8NFcAETw2XgAFLzwbXQA3PD9aABY8DmwAIjwpWQAkCDwoUwAZPCRWAAY8N1QACTx-UgA

swap Tulu or Faros for Goliath in the lemurian team. Goliath buff are more impactful than Tulu's. Also keep in mind that lemurians is a fairly expensive team, you'll need to raise all 4 members (including soulforge levels). Since your gmurphy is e3, she'll want rewinding time to gamble for extra Waltz uses post exalt, as well as +12 titan to reduce waltz cost and maximize her burst. Give dreams of medicine once you unlock that covenant. Goliath > Tulu explanation: https://www.reddit.com/r/Morimens/comments/1tk9hd3/comment/ongzyhc/?context=3

Everything else looks fine to me. Friendly reminder that one of your teams should be borrowing a whale awakener (the most straightforward one usually being Mouchette), which usually means you can be more lacking when supporting it.

embeds.description: no, tentacle damage scaling works on the base value of a card which then takes the damage multipliers and crit values of the character in question. boosting the damage of tentacle hits, on the other hand, only affects the tentacle hits which use reduced crit scaling as it works off team avg, in addi

content: I finally got Goliath, so yeah i'm gonna put him in the lemurian team
Gotcha, will definitely try Saya for sure. Do the divine realm bonuses for blue and red stack? Like the damage amp for example?
I actually have one copy of Thais wheel. If im replacing Gmurphy with Saya, who should be my keyflare bot? I dont see Saya spamming cards.
Is 1 copy enough?
I see Murphy listed as a "Keyflare Tank" in the tier list, but do I really have to rouse her for the keyflare generation?
I haven't tested it, but they should at half rate each (check the end of the passives explaining divine and propagation realms)
Murphy, but with Thais' wheel using her cards doesn't matter as much. If Murphy is your keyflare bot then try to rouse her too for more keyflare generation.
For the +1 arith yes, for boosting Saya's corrosion you'll eventually want to e3 the wheel, but at e0 it works fine
This is what i got right now btw
You don't have to, but it is a noticeable amount, consider doing it on longer battles
With gmpurhy gone I guess murphy can easily be the 2nd rouse priority, true
I suggest moving the R wheel from Murphy and replace it with the SR keyflare wheel that gives aliemus on posse (the one with the silver key icon)
Also bring the R wheel gluttony, max hp is pretty important no matter the team
Gotcha, ill try that out
Whisper is also a good alternative for Aged if you believe you're doing fine in the keyflare department and want to pursue through exalt more often
But that's more up to preference
Honestly at this point, the only reason I have trouble with mob fights is bec I have no AoE, but Vortice pursue still oneshots all non-bosses so far. Hoping that Saya helps with that a bit
Usually what happens is I rip 1 posse at the start, then take 2 turns or so building up another posse, so it takes time.
If mobs and AoE is the main issue, you can also try GMurphy and bring Whisper so that she exalts, kills and instantly get 50 aliemus for the next fight
I actually havent tried Whisper yet. But I'll give Saya a go first.

Oh right another question. Says in the new player doc that I should try to do D Tide as soon as i unlock it. How possible is that with my current roster? I know the current events rewards lots of exp and edify mats, so I can raise units to lvl 40 no problem, but I'm not sure which units to make teams with.

Very, keep in mind that alert 2 already gives all the pull rewards. Plus, you have a few dps you can raise further and have them carry (Pollux, Kath, Vortice, Gmurphy, Saya+someone else, etc) while having some degree of support. Plus, the 5th can be anything since you'll be borrowing a whale. Cheri's guide shows examples of very starved teams for that reason.
Set yourself a target score and see how much you need to worry about good teambuilding to achieve it

I think youre looking at another guys roster who replied here haha. For mine i was thinking my options are something like:

2. caec+naut counter?

4. saya + randos??
5. full blue gmurphy?
6. whale team
Not really good at teambuilding yet.
Oh yeah mb, brain is a bit scrambled.

Main thing is that you need 19 awakeners at least, I'd suggest you expand your roster by pulling the standard banner of different realms. At lower difficulties, the teams you mention should work. For whale team, you can literally bring whatever you have left with a level 90 mouchette and you should obliterate anything below a5 (as long as mouchette has time to prep her burst)
The pictures at the top do not show the whole roster, so I'll assume you have enough units to make the teams in the first place

Caecus/Nautila is pretty baller, just make sure to rouse him asap so that he can heal tons.
